name: handoff
description:
Transfer the current task to a different identity tier.

Use this when a task would be better handled by a different tier's capabilities. Assess honestly whether your current tier is the right fit.

The available tiers are listed in the `target_tier` enum. Choose based on the tier whose specialty matches the work that needs to be done next.

Provide a clear reason for the handoff so the receiving tier has context.

target_tier.description: Target identity tier to hand off to

reason.description: Brief explanation of why handoff is needed and what the receiving tier should do
